Package neqsim.process.safety.opendrain

Class OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.opendrain.OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator
public static class OpenDrainProcessEvidenceCalculator.DesignBasis extends Object implements Serializable
Design and safeguard basis for converting NeqSim process evidence into open-drain evidence.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form
